images.title: Chassezac04.jpg
images.description: Chassezac River in the Ardèche landsacape, France. Looking N-N-W from the top of the Côte Saint-Eugène. The beach, the begining of which can be seen on the right, is that of Cornillon in the east of Les Vans commune. The houses bordering the river on the left of the photo are Peyreflore, with Pontier on its right. The group of houses behind Pontier and the approx. 15 square white-roofed bungalows is la Rouvière.
